text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I can't believe today's the day!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I just got a call from my sisters. They
said the whole family's cheering me on.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I want to give it my best and win for my own sake,
but also, I really want to make my sisters proud...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Today's the day—I'm winning this one! Just you
watch!
choice_data_list: Get out there and give it all you've got!
